AI/gaming: Anything gaming related that does not fit into the other categories
AI/news: Newsletters, updates, and announcements from companies and organizations
AI/work: Work-related emails, including communications with colleagues, clients, and project updates
AI/social: Emails from social media platforms, online communities, and forums
AI/payments: Invoices, receipts, and payment confirmations from online purchases and subscriptions
AI/promotions: Promotional emails, discounts, and offers from retailers and service providers
AI/personal: Personal emails from friends, family, and acquaintances
AI/other: Any emails that do not fit into the above categories
AI/spam: Unwanted or unsolicited emails, often containing advertisements or scams
AI/paychecks: Emails related to paychecks, salary, and financial transactions
AI/travel: Emails related to travel bookings, itineraries, and confirmations
AI/urgent: Emails that require immediate attention or action, such as urgent requests or critical updates
